lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: How did King Adoni-Zedek feel after hearing about Jericho and Ai?
answers: He was excited to meet Israel
It didn't bother him at all

questions.text: What did King Adoni-Zedek do to Israel?
answers: He joined four other kings and attacked Gibeon
He ran away from the land

questions.text: When the Gibeonites were attacked, what did they do?
answers: They asked Joshua to rescue them

questions.text: What did God tell Joshua before the battle began?
answers: Don’t be afraid. I have handed your enemies over to you
Make a deal with the kings

questions.text: After Joshua’s men marched all night to Gibeon, what did God first do to their enemies?
answers: He made the soldiers panic and run away

questions.text: As their enemies ran away, how did God help Israel?
answers: He threw down hailstones from the sky

questions.text: What bold prayer did Joshua pray?
What did God do after Joshua’s prayer?
answers: He stopped the sun in the sky for about a day until the battle was over
He made the night come early
He sent darkness over the land
He made the moon shine brighter

questions.text: What does this teach us about God’s power?
answers: He can do more than we imagine
He only listens during the day
